mnemonics: TEMPLATES: Templates Ensure Many Programs Leverage A Trusted, Efficient Standard
keyPoints: Smart contract templates are pre-written, reusable code for common blockchain functions.
They provide a secure and audited foundation, reducing development time and potential errors.
Templates are crucial for standardization and interoperability within a specific blockchain ecosystem.
commonMistakes: Assuming a template is completely bug-free and doesn't require any auditing for a specific use case.
Using a template from an untrusted or unaudited source, which could introduce vulnerabilities.
